series_metadata.series_description: Sec 4732.22(D) requires registration of unlicensed persons practicing under supervision of a licensed psychologist.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: 5 years after termination of supervision, then destroy. For papers scanned to PDF, destroy immediately upon confirmation that the electronic file image is legible. ; Electronic: For forms scanned to PDF, retain for 5 years following termination of supervision and then destroy., Paper: Recycle ; Electronic: Erase
